name: Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Sahur
lore:
Lore of Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Sahur
                                    


Job Job Job Sahur is an English brainrot who is based on Tung Tung Tung Sahur or job application memes. He takes the form of an anthropomorphic job application with the word JOB written on him. He also wields a baseball bat. He chases people who are unemployed
In "Job Job Job", the triplication of the "jobs" do not correspond to any established pattern in morphology or oral convention and appears to be phonetically incidental. “Sahur” resembles a real term used in various Islamic contexts, although within this name it is detached from its customary temporal, cultural, or religious associations and does not serve a definable semantic role.
Lyrics
Version 1 (English)
Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Job, Sahur! Job application for you, bitch!
Version 1 (Spanish)
Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, Trabajo, sahur! ¡Aplicación de trabajo para tí, perra
Version 1 (Italian)
Lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, lavoro, sahur! Domanda di lavoro per te, stronza
Version 1 (Turkish)
İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, İş, sahur! İş başvurusu sana kaltak!
Version 1 (Russian)
Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Работа, Сахур! Заявление о приёме на работу для тебя, сука!
Version 1 (Indonesian)
Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Ayub, Sahur! Lamaran kerja untukmu, jalang!
Version 1 (censored)
Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Job Sahur, Job application for you, b*tch!
